purpose: A deterministic same-repository, whole-source-document-held-out and training-text-excluded Korean legal/public-administration retrieval set for the clean comprehensive board.

independence.label: same-repository source-document-held-out with exact training-text exclusion
independence.reason: Queries and passages use the same pinned Legalize-KR repositories and source-native schemas as training, while each source_document_sha256 and every normalized query/positive text are absent from declared training inputs.

selection.rank_material: seed, repository, source_candidate_id, normalized query SHA-256, normalized positive SHA-256
training_exclusion: normalized query SHA-256 against every declared training role
normalized positive SHA-256 against every declared training role

output_contract.provenance: provenance.jsonl: full pinned source provenance and all exclusion/selection evidence
output_contract.manifest: manifest.json: deterministic inputs, hashes, counts, source balance, assertions, and independence grade
